message:
feat(server): return 501 for deferred browser TUI mirror endpoints (br-il53l.11)

Replace /mail/ws-state, /mail/ws-input, /web-dashboard, /web-dashboard/state,
/web-dashboard/stream, and /web-dashboard/input handlers with 501 Not Implemented
responses pointing to the deferred spec doc and tracker. Update all affected
tests to assert the new 501 behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
